notes: After-hours read into the July 4 close: VIX calm at 16.1 and broad tape constructive (Dow record), but chip/memory rotation persists (MU -15.9%, AMAT -8.6%) and cash is only $68, so I hold defensive 0.5 with no room to add.
journal_entry: Thu 7/2 17:49: neutral/0.5, VIX 16.1, day P&L -$15. Nothing materially changed since the close — rotation intact, MU/AMAT still the drags and parked in avoid. Markets closed early for July 4; watching for post-holiday reopen and whether soft payrolls tilts to rate-cut hopes vs growth scare.
